tagline: Certified Bay Area Landscape Design and Construction Firm

hero.headline:
48 Years Transforming Bay Area
Outdoor Living
hero.subheadline: Your backyard should be your favorite room. Koch & Associates has spent nearly five decades turning Bay Area landscapes into stunning outdoor retreats — designing, building, and perfecting every detail so you can simply enjoy.
checkmarks: One point of contact, start to finish

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Landscape Solutions<br class="hidden md:block">Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From initial concept to final walkthrough, our master-builder approach keeps your project on vision, on budget, and on schedule — all through a single point of contact.

cards.title: Landscape Design
cards.description: Custom landscape plans that translate your vision into every detail — thoughtfully designed around your lifestyle, your property, and how you actually live outdoors.

cards.title: Landscape Construction
cards.description: Full-service build teams who bring your design to life with precision craftsmanship. One point of contact from groundbreaking to the final walkthrough.

cards.title: Pools & Spas
cards.description: Swimming pools and spas integrated seamlessly into your landscape design — creating a cohesive outdoor experience, not just a pool dropped in a yard.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Year-round entertaining spaces built with premium materials and professional-grade appliances. Cook, gather, and enjoy under the California sky.

cards.title: Masonry & Hardscaping
cards.description: Retaining walls, patios, walkways, pavers, and decorative concrete — expert masonry that adds structure, beauty, and lasting value to your property.

cards.title: Fire & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fire bowls, fountains, and water walls that bring warmth, sound, and movement to your outdoor living space.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Landscape

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Schedule a free design consultation at your home. We listen to what you want to accomplish, assess your space, and discuss possibilities — no pressure, just honest conversation.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: Our master-builder team creates detailed plans, then constructs everything in-house. One point of contact ensures your design vision stays intact from blueprint to backyard.

steps.title: Love Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Step into a landscape that looks exactly like you imagined — and functions even better. With 48 years of craftsmanship behind it, your outdoor space is built to last.

about.label: Why Bay Area Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: The Master-Builder Difference Since 1978
about.description: Founded in 1978, Koch & Associates is one of the Bay Area's longest-running landscape construction firms. Our master-builder approach means your designer and builder work as one team — ensuring that what gets drawn is exactly what gets built. Diamond Certified for six consecutive years, we bring nearly five decades of craftsmanship to every project across the San Francisco Bay Area.

features.title: Diamond Certified 6 Years
features.description: Rated highest in quality and helpful expertise by Diamond Certified — an honor earned through verified customer satisfaction, not purchased.

features.title: One Team, Start to Finish
features.description: Our master-builder approach means design and construction happen under one roof. No miscommunication, no finger-pointing, no surprises.

features.title: Top 11% in California
features.description: BuildZoom ranks us in the top 11% of all California licensed contractors. Our track record speaks for itself — 48 years and counting.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom, so we quote based on your specific vision. Schedule a free consultation and get an honest, detailed estimate — no hidden fees, no change-order games.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any element of your project does not meet the quality standards we agreed upon, we will come back and make it right at no additional cost. We have stood behind our work for 48 years because we believe craftsmanship means never cutting corners — and never leaving until you are completely satisfied.

faqs.question: How long does a typical landscape project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope. A backyard remodel typically takes 4-8 weeks, while larger projects with pools, outdoor kitchens, and extensive hardscaping can take 3-6 months. We provide a detailed timeline during the design phase and keep you updated throughout construction.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during construction?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide access and we manage the entire process. Your dedicated project manager sends regular updates with photos so you always know exactly what is happening, even when you are at work.

faqs.question: What areas of the Bay Area do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve communities across the San Francisco Bay Area from our three offices in Fremont, San Jose, and San Mateo. Our service area includes Campbell, Danville, Los Altos, Los Gatos, Menlo Park, Mountain View, Oakland, Palo Alto, Pleasanton, Saratoga, Sunnyvale, and surrounding areas.

faqs.question: What does Diamond Certified mean?
faqs.answer: Diamond Certified is an independent rating organization that surveys real customers to verify quality and satisfaction. We have earned this certification for six consecutive years, meaning our customers consistently rate us highest in quality and helpful expertise. It is not something companies can buy — it must be earned.

faqs.question: Can you handle the entire project from design through construction?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our master-builder approach means we handle everything in-house — landscape design, construction, hardscaping, pools, outdoor kitchens, and more. One team, one point of contact, and one vision carried through from your first consultation to your final walkthrough.

testimonials.name: Peter S.
testimonials.text: They listen to what you're trying to accomplish, design, listen again, discuss, get agreement and then execute. They say what they are going to do and do what they say.

testimonials.name: Cricket L.
testimonials.text: We couldn't be happier with the result. I wholeheartedly recommend them to anyone looking for quality.

testimonials.name: Brian H.
testimonials.text: We are super pleased with the work, communications, design and professionalism of everyone. They started on the day they said they would start, and finished on the day they said they would finish.
